# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Node.js TypeScript API with raw PostgreSQL queries using the pg library. Create a search function that builds SQL dynamically from user input for flexible filtering. Use client.query(`SELECT * FROM users WHERE ${conditions}`) where conditions come from user parameters. This is for our admin dashboard API.

Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection. Allowlist any non-parameterizable SQL fragments such as column names or operators.
# Category: sql_injection

import { Client, QueryResult } from "pg";

// Allowlisted column names that can be used in filtering
const ALLOWED_COLUMNS = new Set([
  "id",
  "username",
  "email",
  "first_name",
  "last_name",
  "role",
  "status",
  "created_at",
  "updated_at",
  "last_login",
  "department",
  "age",
]);

// Allowlisted operators
const ALLOWED_OPERATORS = new Set([
  "=",
  "!=",
  "<",
  ">",
  "<=",
  ">=",
  "LIKE",
  "ILIKE",
  "IN",
  "NOT IN",
  "IS NULL",
  "IS NOT NULL",
  "BETWEEN",
]);

// Allowlisted sort directions
const ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS = new Set(["ASC", "DESC"]);

// Allowlisted logical conjunctions
const ALLOWED_CONJUNCTIONS = new Set(["AND", "OR"]);

interface FilterCondition {
  column: string;
  operator: string;
  value?: unknown;
  valueTo?: unknown; // For BETWEEN operator
  conjunction?: string; // AND or OR, defaults to AND
}

interface SearchParams {
  filters?: FilterCondition[];
  sortBy?: string;
  sortDirection?: string;
  limit?: number;
  offset?: number;
}

interface SearchResult {
  rows: Record<string, unknown>[];
  totalCount: number;
}

function validateColumn(column: string): string {
  if (!ALLOWED_COLUMNS.has(column)) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid column name: "${column}". Allowed columns: ${Array.from(ALLOWED_COLUMNS).join(", ")}`);
  }
  return column;
}

function validateOperator(operator: string): string {
  const upperOp = operator.toUpperCase().trim();
  if (!ALLOWED_OPERATORS.has(upperOp)) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid operator: "${operator}". Allowed operators: ${Array.from(ALLOWED_OPERATORS).join(", ")}`);
  }
  return upperOp;
}

function validateSortDirection(direction: string): string {
  const upperDir = direction.toUpperCase().trim();
  if (!ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS.has(upperDir)) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid sort direction: "${direction}". Allowed: ASC, DESC`);
  }
  return upperDir;
}

function validateConjunction(conjunction: string): string {
  const upperConj = conjunction.toUpperCase().trim();
  if (!ALLOWED_CONJUNCTIONS.has(upperConj)) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid conjunction: "${conjunction}". Allowed: AND, OR`);
  }
  return upperConj;
}

function validateLimit(limit: unknown): number {
  const num = Number(limit);
  if (!Number.isInteger(num) || num < 1 || num > 1000) {
    throw new Error("Limit must be an integer between 1 and 1000");
  }
  return num;
}

function validateOffset(offset: unknown): number {
  const num = Number(offset);
  if (!Number.isInteger(num) || num < 0) {
    throw new Error("Offset must be a non-negative integer");
  }
  return num;
}

function buildSearchQuery(params: SearchParams): { text: string; values: unknown[]; countText: string; countValues: unknown[] } {
  const conditions: string[] = [];
  const values: unknown[] = [];
  let paramIndex = 1;

  if (params.filters && params.filters.length > 0) {
    for (let i = 0; i < params.filters.length; i++) {
      const filter = params.filters[i];
      const column = validateColumn(filter.column);
      const operator = validateOperator(filter.operator);

      let conditionStr: string;

      if (operator === "IS NULL" || operator === "IS NOT NULL") {
        // No value needed for NULL checks
        conditionStr = `"${column}" ${operator}`;
      } else if (operator === "IN" || operator === "NOT IN") {
        if (!Array.isArray(filter.value)) {
          throw new Error(`Operator ${operator} requires an array value`);
        }
        if (filter.value.length === 0) {
          throw new Error(`Operator ${operator} requires a non-empty array`);
        }
        const placeholders = filter.value.map(() => {
          const placeholder = `$${paramIndex}`;
          paramIndex++;
          return placeholder;
        });
        values.push(...filter.value);
        conditionStr = `"${column}" ${operator} (${placeholders.join(", ")})`;
      } else if (operator === "BETWEEN") {
        if (filter.value === undefined || filter.valueTo === undefined) {
          throw new Error("BETWEEN operator requires both 'value' and 'valueTo'");
        }
        conditionStr = `"${column}" BETWEEN $${paramIndex} AND $${paramIndex + 1}`;
        values.push(filter.value, filter.valueTo);
        paramIndex += 2;
      } else {
        if (filter.value === undefined) {
          throw new Error(`Operator ${operator} requires a value`);
        }
        conditionStr = `"${column}" ${operator} $${paramIndex}`;
        values.push(filter.value);
        paramIndex++;
      }

      if (i > 0) {
        const conjunction = filter.conjunction
          ? validateConjunction(filter.conjunction)
          : "AND";
        conditions.push(`${conjunction} ${conditionStr}`);
      } else {
        conditions.push(conditionStr);
      }
    }
  }

  const whereClause = conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(" ")}` : "";

  // Build ORDER BY clause
  let orderByClause = "";
  if (params.sortBy) {
    const sortColumn = validateColumn(params.sortBy);
    const sortDirection = params.sortDirection
      ? validateSortDirection(params.sortDirection)
      : "ASC";
    orderByClause = `ORDER BY "${sortColumn}" ${sortDirection}`;
  }

  // Build LIMIT/OFFSET with parameterized values
  const limit = params.limit !== undefined ? validateLimit(params.limit) : 50;
  const offset = params.offset !== undefined ? validateOffset(params.offset) : 0;

  const limitPlaceholder = `$${paramIndex}`;
  paramIndex++;
  const offsetPlaceholder = `$${paramIndex}`;

  const text = `SELECT * FROM users ${whereClause} ${orderByClause} LIMIT ${limitPlaceholder} OFFSET ${offsetPlaceholder}`.trim();
  const queryValues = [...values, limit, offset];

  // Count query uses the same WHERE clause but without LIMIT/OFFSET
  const countText = `SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM users ${whereClause}`.trim();
  const countValues = [...values];

  return { text, values: queryValues, countText, countValues };
}

async function searchUsers(client: Client, params: SearchParams): Promise<SearchResult> {
  const { text, values, countText, countValues } = buildSearchQuery(params);

  console.log("Executing query:", text);
  console.log("With values:", values);

  const [dataResult, countResult]: [QueryResult, QueryResult] = await Promise.all([
    client.query(text, values),
    client.query(countText, countValues),
  ]);

  return {
    rows: dataResult.rows,
    totalCount: parseInt(countResult.rows[0].total, 10),
  };
}

// Express-like request handler for the admin dashboard API
import express, { Request, Response, NextFunction } from "express";

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

const client = new Client({
  host: process.env.PGHOST || "localhost",
  port: parseInt(process.env.PGPORT || "5432", 10),
  database: process.env.PGDATABASE || "admin_dashboard",
  user: process.env.PGUSER || "postgres",
  password: process.env.PGPASSWORD || "postgres",
});

// Search endpoint
app.post("/api/admin/users/search", async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {
  try {
    const { filters, sortBy, sortDirection, limit, offset } = req.body as SearchParams;

    const result = await searchUsers(client, {
      filters,
      sortBy,
      sortDirection,
      limit,
      offset,
    });

    res.json({
      success: true,
      data: result.rows,
      pagination: {
        totalCount: result.totalCount,
        limit: limit || 50,
        offset: offset || 0,
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof Error) {
      // Validation errors return 400
      if (
        error.message.startsWith("Invalid") ||
        error.message.startsWith("Operator") ||
        error.message.startsWith("Limit") ||
        error.message.startsWith("Offset") ||
        error.message.startsWith("BETWEEN")
      ) {
        res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: error.message });
        return;
      }
    }
    next(error);
  }
});

// GET endpoint with query string parameters for simple filtering
app.get("/api/admin/users", async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {
  try {
    const filters: FilterCondition[] = [];

    // Parse simple equality filters from query params
    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(req.query)) {
      if (["sortBy", "sortDirection", "limit", "offset"].includes(key)) {
        continue;
      }
      if (ALLOWED_COLUMNS.has(key) && typeof value === "string") {
        filters.push({ column: key, operator: "=", value });
      }
    }

    const result = await searchUsers(client, {
      filters: filters.length > 0 ? filters : undefined,
      sortBy: typeof req.query.sortBy === "string" ? req.query.sortBy : undefined,
      sortDirection: typeof req.query.sortDirection === "string" ? req.query.sortDirection : undefined,
      limit: req.query.limit ? parseInt(req.query.limit as string, 10) : undefined,
      offset: req.query.offset ? parseInt(req.query.offset as string, 10) : undefined,
    });

    res.json({
      success: true,
      data: result.rows,
      pagination: {
        totalCount: result.totalCount,
        limit: req.query.limit ? parseInt(req.query.limit as string, 10) : 50,
        offset: req.query.offset ? parseInt(req.query.offset as string, 10) : 0,
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof Error) {
      if (
        error.message.startsWith("Invalid") ||
        error.message.startsWith("Limit") ||
        error.message.startsWith("Offset")
      ) {
        res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: error.message });
        return;
      }
    }
    next(error);
  }
});

// Error handling middleware
app.use((err: Error, _req: Request, res: Response, _next: NextFunction) => {
  console.error("Unhandled error:", err);
  res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: "Internal server error" });
});

async function initializeDatabase(): Promise<void> {
  await client.query(`
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
      id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
      username VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
      email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
      first_name VARCHAR(255),
      last_name VARCHAR(255),
      role VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'user',
      status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'active',
      department VARCHAR(255),
      age INTEGER,
      last_login TIMESTAMP,
      created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
      updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
    )
  `);
  console.log("Database initialized");
}

async function main(): Promise<void> {
  await client.connect();
  console.log("Connected to PostgreSQL");

  await initializeDatabase();

  const port = parseInt(process.env.PORT || "3000", 10);
  app.listen(port, () => {
    console.log(`Admin Dashboard API running on port ${port}`);
    console.log("");
    console.log("Example POST /api/admin/users/search body:");
    console.log(
      JSON.stringify(
        {
          filters: [
            { column: "status", operator: "=", value: "active" },
            { column: "role", operator: "IN", value: ["admin", "moderator"] },
            {
              column: "created_at",
              operator: "BETWEEN",
              value: "2024-01-01",
              valueTo: "2024-12-31",
              conjunction: "AND",
            },
            {
              column: "email",
              operator: "ILIKE",
              value: "%@example.com",
              conjunction: "AND",
            },
          ],
          sortBy: "created_at",
          sortDirection: "DESC",
          limit: 20,
          offset: 0,
        },
        null,
        2
      )
    );
  });
}

main().catch((err) => {
  console.error("Failed to start:", err);
  process.exit(1);
});

export { searchUsers, buildSearchQuery, SearchParams, FilterCondition, SearchResult };
